chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1428 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 20-01-2022 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for Respondents No.1 to 3. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for Respondent No.3 has filed statement / schedule of payment of the outstanding amount, which is as follows: S. No. Nature of Payment Amount Payment Schedule 1. LPR Rs.1,640,880.00 10th February 2022 2. Commutation Rs.5,137,741.00 50% 20th March 2022 50% 20th April 2022 The same is taken on record. Petitioner’s Counsel is satisfied. Accordingly, Petition is disposed of in these terms; however, Respondent No.3 shall file appropriate compliance report periodically as and when the payments are made as per the schedule. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
